name: test-motivation-toolkit
description: Plays sounds and roasts you when your tests fail.

test-motivation-toolkit.enableFailSound.description: Play a sound when tests fail.

test-motivation-toolkit.enableSuccessSou.description: Play a sound when tests pass.

test-motivation-toolkit.failSoundPath.description: Absolute path to a custom fail sound. Leave empty to use the built-in default.

test-motivation-toolkit.successSoundPath.description: Absolute path to a custom success sound. Leave empty to use the built-in default.

test-motivation-toolkit.enableRoastMode.description: Show roast messages when tests fail.

test-motivation-toolkit.cooldownMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between sound/roast triggers per terminal.

test-motivation-toolkit.openRouterApiKey.description: OpenRouter API key for AI-generated roasts.
